subject: FW: New Selections for Palm Beach
body:
Told him to bring the pillows and to send pics of the lamps and that all the rooms needed them and floor lamps too and that if and when he met you to bring lamps with if he did not have pics to send for your approval...
-----Original Message-----
From: Jeffrey Gilman [mailto:jgilman@artefactousa.com]
Sent: Wed 1/9/2008 12:24 PM
To: 'Jennifer Turner'
Cc: 'Rachel Hartley'
Subject: New Selections for Palm Beach
 
Hi Jennifer,

 

The following selections have been made for areas of your home. I will list them in order of the pictures attached.

Bedroom #1

1)     Segal Headboard to replace dark headboard. This will be in a light wood finish.

2)     2 Ellis bedside tables also in a light wood finish.  

3)     2 horizontal Bee Tables for plasma tv in white microtexture. To be stacked one on top of the other for correct height for tv.

 

Bedroom #4

 

1)     Gatti Headboard to replace existing dark finish. This will be in Natural leather sand with a light wood finish.

2)     2 Bee Side tables for either side of Headboard to be used as bedside tables. These are the only pieces small enough to fit. These will be in microtexture white.

3)     Savoia Console to be used for plasma tv. Stainless and clear glass top.
  

Other recommendations:

 

*We would like to select some pillows for the Conrad Sofa in the living room to complete the piece if this is ok with you. You can let me know if you like them next time you visit. I would also like to select some lamps to bring for the bedside tables. Can u tell me which rooms you would like them in?   

 

Upstairs Hallway to Master Bedroom

 

1)     2 Hayden Consoles with mirror tops. Two of these will fit perfectly in this space as we have drawn out in plan.

 

Desk Area at Palm Trees

 

1)     2 Sao Paulo Consoles for the fax and printer on casters so it can be easily moved around. The finish would be microtexture chocolate.

 

Dining Room

 

1)     1 Aires Console Trolly with casters for holding and serving. Finish to be stainless with microtexture chocolate.

 

 

 

Thank you for your time Jennifer. I will wait to hear your reply on the above pieces before arranging any deliveries next week.

 

Jeffrey Gilman
